steps.title: Read the radius
steps.content:
A circle in standard form has the squared radius on the right side. Here the equation has right side $25$, so
$$
r^2=25
$$

steps.title: Double the radius
steps.content: The radius is $$ r=\sqrt{25}=5 $$ The diameter is twice the radius: $$ d=2(5)=10 $$ The answer is B.
